lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: I'm the Account Guide. I'm here to tell you about your account.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's an account?

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: Your character IS your account! It's what you are using to play the game right now. Everyone here has one and some people even have multiple!

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: There’s various things you can do with your account which is where the Account Management menu comes into play. Let’s take a look at it now.

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: As you can see, there's a few things you can do with your account.

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: First, you have membership. All accounts are free to play by default but if you desire, you can buy membership to unlock members' worlds. These worlds give you access to extra skills, areas, quests, and more!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's a world?

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: A world is what you play the game on. Most worlds can hold up to 2000 players. They are split into two main types: free worlds and members' worlds. You can swap worlds with the World Switcher in the Logout menu.

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: You are currently on a free world. If you want to switch to a members’ world and enjoy all of the benefits, you’ll need to purchase membership. You can do so using the store in the Account Management menu.

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: You are currently on a members' world so you already have access to everything that being a member has to offer. Enjoy!

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: Bonds are another thing that you should know about. You can purchase Bonds from the store in the Account Management menu. Once you have some Bonds, you can redeem them for membership!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But why would I use a Bond instead of just buying membership normally?

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: Unlike membership, Bonds can be traded with other players. You could purchase a Bond and then sell it to another player for some gold. Alternatively, you could use your gold to buy a Bond from another player!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So if I used my gold to buy a Bond from another player, I could get membership without spending any real money?

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: Exactly!

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: Next up, you have your inbox and name changer. The inbox is where you’ll receive important information related to your account and the game. Be sure to keep an eye on it.

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: The name changer allows you to change your display name if you don't like your current one. Be aware though that this is only available to accounts with membership.

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: Finally, the bottom of the menu has some links which you might find useful. Make sure you check them out at some point.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Awesome. Is there anything else I should know about accounts?

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: Your account is very valuable and it's important you look after it. Various tools can help with this, such as Bank PINs and two-factor authentication options.

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: You'll find more information on account security on the Customer Support webpage. You can use the Useful Links section of the Account Management menu to get there.

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: Anyway, that's everything I have to tell you about accounts. Let me know if you need a recap, otherwise head on to your next instructor.

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: Hello. Would you like to hear about your account again?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: Excellent. Well there's a few things you can do with your account.

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: First, you have membership. All accounts are free to play by default but if you desire, you can buy membership to unlock members' worlds. These worlds give you access to extra skills, areas, quests, and more!

lines.text: You are currently on a free world. If you want to switch to a members' world and enjoy all of the benefits, you'll need to purchase membership. You can do so using the store in the Account Management menu.

lines.speaker: Account Guide

lines.text: Bonds are another thing that you should know about. You can purchase Bonds from the store in the Account Management menu. Once you have some Bonds, you can redeem them for membership!

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: Exactly!

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: Next up, you have your inbox. The inbox is where you'll receive important information related to your account and the game. Be sure to keep an eye on it.

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: Finally, you have your display name. Every account has a unique display name. If you don't like your current one, you can change it with the name changer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Awesome. Is there anything else I should know about accounts?

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: Your account is very valuable and it's important you look after it. Various tools can help with this, such as Bank PINs and two-factor authentication options.

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: You'll find more information on account security on the Customer Support webpage. You can use the Useful Links section of the Account Management menu to get there.

lines.speaker: Account Guide
lines.text: Anyway, that's everything. I hope that has helped you out.
